title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
